name: Rhubarb Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the rind of oranges and lemon.
2. Extract the juice from the oranges and lemon.
3. Wash and cut the rhubarb into 1/2-inch pieces.
4. Combine all ingredients except nuts in a pot.
5. Heat slowly until the sugar is dissolved.
6. Simmer slowly, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and becomes clear.
7. Add the chopped nuts and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
